title: APC PDU SNMP Branch Circuit Load Balancing Analysis
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:pdu"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:pdu" earliest=-24h
| eval l1=tonumber(coalesce(rPDUPhaseStatusLoad, phase_l1_amps, ""))/10
| eval l2=tonumber(coalesce(rPDUPhaseStatusLoad2, phase_l2_amps, ""))/10
| eval l3=tonumber(coalesce(rPDUPhaseStatusLoad3, phase_l3_amps, ""))/10
| eval imbalance=max(max(abs(l1-l2),abs(l2-l3)),abs(l3-l1))
| stats avg(l1) as avg_l1 avg(l2) as avg_l2 avg(l3) as avg_l3 avg(imbalance) as avg_imbalance by pdu_name
description: Phase imbalance increases neutral current and breaker stress; PDUs expose per-phase draw for re-cabling decisions.
implementation: (1) Three-phase PDUs only. (2) Export top imbalanced PDUs quarterly.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.
